payload.author: Bri
payload.body: VERIFIED via xcodebuild (iOS simulator, generic destination): BUILD SUCCEEDED. SCP-104 path is concurrency-clean — making HubClient @MainActor resolved all 8 'sending client' warnings under SWIFT_STRICT_CONCURRENCY=complete. SCP-135 sync engine compiles. Compile-only verification (not a runtime device/sim run). Residual project-wide Swift-6 warnings (decoder formatters, KeychainStore.shared, delegate mutable props) are unrelated to 104/135 and tracked in SCP-166.
